tasks.title: Implement Core Data Schemas
tasks.goal: Create JSON schemas for all core entities (Idea, Project, Task, Artifact, EvidencePack, Experience)

tasks.title: Implement Planner Loop
tasks.goal: Build the core Planner orchestration engine with task scheduling and worker assignment

tasks.title: Implement Worker Registry
tasks.goal: Create worker registry system with XP tracking and reputation

tasks.title: Implement Policy Engine
tasks.goal: Build policy enforcement engine with Execution, Safety, and Quality policies

tasks.title: Implement Connection Manager
tasks.goal: Create connection manager for API keys, OAuth, and local models with capability tokens

tasks.title: Implement Experience Ledger
tasks.goal: Build experience storage and retrieval system with XP credits

tasks.title: Implement Skill Hub Loader
tasks.goal: Create skill loader with manifest validation and security scanning

tasks.title: Implement Dashboard API
tasks.goal: Build dashboard backend with project path graph and review inbox

tasks.title: Implement Human Gate System
tasks.goal: Create Review Card generation and approval workflow

tasks.title: Implement Realtime Command Interface
tasks.goal: Build conversational command parser for real-time Planner control
